name: tampermonkey-mcp

scripts.all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run lint
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:run --
scripts.test:debug: func() { nodemon --ext ts --exec "npm run build; NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules --experimental-specifier-resolution=node' node --inspect-brk ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand $@"; }; func
scripts.test:watch: func() { nodemon --ext ts --exec "npm run build; NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules --experimental-specifier-resolution=node' node ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand $@"; }; func

author: Jan Biniok
description: Manage Tampermonkey userscripts via Model Context Protocol (MCP). List, read, write, patch, and delete userscripts directly from AI-powered development tools.
